Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Community Data Science Learning Tracker

As a community member learning data science, I want to track my cheat sheet completion and assessment progress, so that I can build competency systematically and get mentorship support.
@progress-tracking @quiz-assessment
Scenario Member tracks cheat sheet completion for SQL category
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am a community member with access to the learning tracker
AndI am working through the "SQL" category cheat sheets
WhenI mark all SQL cheat sheets as reviewed
Thenmy "SQL" category status is updated to "cheat-sheets-complete"
Andthe system records the completion date for each cheat sheet
@quiz-assessment
Scenario Member completes a quiz assessment for Machine Learning category
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI have completed the "Machine Learning" cheat sheets
WhenI score 70% or higher on the ML assessment quiz
Thenmy "Machine Learning" category status is updated to "assessed"
Andthe system records my score and assessment date
@mentorship-pairing
Scenario Member fails quiz and requests reassessment
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI have completed the ML cheat sheets
AndI scored below 70% on the ML assessment quiz
WhenI request a reassessment attempt
Thenthe system creates a "reassessment-pending" status for my ML category
AndI receive a list of recommended review topics before retrying
@mentorship-pairing
Scenario Member requests mentorship pairing for Deep Learning
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am a community member working through the "Deep Learning" category
AndI need guidance on PyTorch, Keras, and TensorFlow workflows
WhenI submit a mentorship request specifying "Deep Learning" category
Thenthe system matches me with a mentor who has "Deep Learning" expertise
Andboth I and the mentor receive a pairing notification
@project-based-assessment
Scenario Mentor and mentee schedule structured learning sessions
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am matched with a mentor for the "NLP" category
Whenmy mentor and I agree on a session schedule of biweekly 1-hour calls
Thenthe system creates a "mentorship-active" record for our NLP pairing
Andeach session is logged with topic covered and next steps
@project-based-assessment
Scenario Member applies Data Engineering skills to IoT Toolkit pipeline
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am a community member working on the Farmers IoT Toolkit
AndI have been working through the "Data Engineering" cheat sheets
WhenI complete a working data pipeline prototype using at least 3 of the covered tools
Thenmy "Data Engineering" category status is updated to "project-assessed"
Andthe prototype is logged as evidence of applied competency
@curriculum-overview
Scenario Member builds a community dashboard applying BI and Data Analytics skills
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI have completed the "Business Intelligence" and "Data Analytics" cheat sheets
AndI have access to community metrics data
WhenI build a dashboard visualization using a BI tool
Thenmy "Business Intelligence" category is marked complete
Andthe dashboard is linked as the project-based assessment artifact
@curriculum-overview
Scenario Curriculum owner views community-wide learning progress
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am a curriculum owner or community coordinator
Andcommunity members have logged progress across categories
WhenI view the learning dashboard
ThenI see aggregated completion rates per category
AndI see which categories have the most mentorship requests
AndI see which members are ready for peer teaching or mentorship roles
@assessment-recording
Scenario New member starts learning pathway from zero
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI am a new community member with no data science background
WhenI join the learning program
ThenI am assigned the recommended starting category order
AndI am offered an optional mentorship pairing for my first category
Scenario Learning progress is recorded in community knowledge graph
Giventhe [[sources/0019-kdnuggets-data-science-cheatsheets|KDnuggets "Complete Collection of Data Science Cheat Sheets"]] is adopted as community reference
Andthe collection covers 12 categories
And[[sources/0018-nvidia-learning-paths-2026|NVIDIA certification]] is the primary curriculum framework
GivenI complete a category assessment or project
Whenthe system records my completion
Thenthe knowledge graph is updated with my member identity and category completed
Andthe assessment type and competency score or project link
Andthis record is available for curriculum review and peer recognition

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
